theory.canonical_statement: ION N VERIFICATION Canonical Statutory For- Daniel Alexander Trawin 23 Trawin Zero Point Opera Omnia Pomerium Internum mula: $N $ = $∫$ Ω $|Ψ(x, t)|2dΩ $ = 1 Formal Technical Dissertation: Final verification of the global wavefunction. Ensures probability conservation within the 153,600-node lattice. Deviations indicate leakage to higher dimensions, corrected by the Jacobian operator. Source: [ID 1111] INTEGRATED INFORMATION SCALING Canonical Statutory Formula: $Φtotal $ = $∑153,600 j=1 ϕj ⊗ Mentanglement $ Formal Technical Dissertation: Scales integrated infor- mation across the sphere. Crossing the 1.185 ratio triggers a global state change, transforming individual nodes into a coherent processor. Source: [ID 1112] UNIFIED HAMILTONIAN SUM $(ĤTrawin) $ Canonical Statutory Formula: $ĤTrawin $ = $ĤEM $ + $Ĥmech+ Ĥint+ Ĥtunnel $ Formal Technical Dissertation: Formalizes the total ene
theory.technical_interpretation: Definition of ∑153,600 J is an algebraic definition, written ∑153,600 j=1 ϕj ⊗ Mentanglement. It is an algebraic definition expressing the quantity directly in terms of the variables on its right-hand side. It is built from j, M, n, a, g, l, defining ∑153,600 j. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.
